name: Observable Response Discrepancy
description: The product provides different responses to incoming requests in a way that reveals internal state information to an unauthorized actor. For example, a login form that returns 'invalid username' vs 'invalid password' allows user enumeration.
detection_pattern: Look for AUTH or CONTROL nodes (login, authentication, lookup) that produce distinct EGRESS responses (different error messages, HTTP status codes) depending on which internal check failed, without a TRANSFORM node (generic error mapping) that normalizes all failure responses into a single uniform output.
